haskell.reason: Haskell notebook cells need a self-hosted GHCi WebAssembly runtime pack. This site does not ship one yet.

mojo.reason: Mojo notebook cells need a Mojo compiler/runtime target for WebAssembly. This site leaves Mojo runtime support last.

rust.reason: Rust notebook cells need a self-hosted rustc or interpreter WebAssembly runtime pack. This site does not ship one yet.
